title: The No-Nonsense Guide to How to Start Selling Digital Products with Crypto — The Full Guide
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: Millions of creators are locked out of platforms like Gumroad, Payhip, and PayPal due to geographic restrictions, banking limitations, or KYC requirements, making it impossible to sell digital products and get paid. In Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, Bangladesh, Ethiopia, Venezuela, Iran, Cameroon, Tanzania, Philippines, and other restricted countries, the struggle to monetize digital creations is real. This guide will walk you through a no-KYC, fully automated method to start selling digital products with crypto, using NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect, a frontend wallet integration with multi-chain QR generation and live price feeds, allowing buyers to pay in BTC, ETH, USDT, SOL, and 300 more coins.
Why This Method Works When Everything Else Fails

This method works because it bypasses traditional payment processors, which often impose restrictive terms and conditions. By using NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect, you can accept payments from anywhere in the world without requiring a buyer account or KYC verification. This means you can focus on creating and selling your digital products without worrying about payment processing hassles.
What You Need Before You Start

Before you start selling digital products with crypto, you'll need to set up your shop and configure your payment and delivery pipeline. This includes creating a digital product, setting a price, and configuring automated delivery using Unchained Commerce's Core Shop Engine. You'll also need to integrate your shop with NOWPayments, which will handle all payment processing and conversion to USD. Additionally, you'll need to obtain a Web3 Wallet Connect license, which will enable you to generate multi-chain QR codes and live price feeds for your buyers.
Setting Up Your Payment and Delivery Pipeline

To set up your payment and delivery pipeline, navigate to the Unchained Commerce dashboard and select the Core Shop Engine. Configure automated delivery by selecting the digital product, setting the price, and choosing the payment method. Next, integrate your shop with NOWPayments by creating a payment gateway and selecting the desired cryptocurrency. Finally, obtain a Web3 Wallet Connect license and generate a multi-chain QR code for your buyers to use.
Reject traditional payment processors and take control of your digital product sales with NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect.
Going Live and Making Your First Sale

Once your payment and delivery pipeline is set up, you're ready to go live and make your first sale. Share your digital product with your audience, and when a buyer makes a purchase, they'll receive an automated email with a link to download the product. You'll also receive an email with payment details and a confirmation that the sale has been processed.
Scaling Once the System Is Running

Scaling a crypto-native digital store does not require changing infrastructure at any particular revenue level. The Core Shop Engine handles payment verification and delivery through the same webhook pipeline whether you are processing five orders a month or five hundred. GitHub Pages scales to any traffic level automatically. NOWPayments handles volume without per-transaction approval delays. The only constraint as you scale is marketing — the technical infrastructure is the same on day one as it is at significant revenue. This is a meaningful advantage over platform-based alternatives where payout policies, fee structures, and compliance requirements often change as your volume increases.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

The fastest path to your first crypto-native digital product sale is a three-step process. First, set up NOWPayments — create an account, configure your wallet address, get your API key. Second, deploy the Core Shop Engine with your product file and NOWPayments credentials. Third, configure Web3 Wallet Connect with your checkout settings and product details. At that point, your store accepts crypto payments and delivers the product automatically. The complete setup, following the included deployment guide, takes most creators two to four hours from start to first test transaction. The Full Stack Bundle at $79.99 includes all three components plus the deployment guide and support access. For a creator who cannot use PayPal or Stripe, this is the infrastructure that makes selling digital products viable.
Accept payments in 300+ cryptocurrencies with Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect, giving you access to a global market.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're looking to sell digital downloads like ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, presets, and beats, you're not alone. Millions of creators are locked out of traditional platforms, but with Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect, you can accept payments in BTC, ETH, USDT, SOL, and 300 more coins. Visit our shop at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html to learn more.
Your Action Checklist

To start selling digital products with crypto, follow these steps: Create a digital product and set a price using Unchained Commerce's Core Shop Engine. Configure automated delivery and payment processing using NOWPayments. Obtain a Web3 Wallet Connect license to generate multi-chain QR codes and live price feeds. Integrate your shop with Web3 Wallet Connect to enable cryptocurrency payments. Test your payment and delivery pipeline to ensure smooth operations. Go live and share your digital product with your audience.
Automate your digital product delivery and payment processing with Unchained Commerce's Core Shop Engine and NOWPayments.
Web3 Wallet Connect — $19.99. Frontend wallet integration with multi-chain QR generation and live price feeds. Let buyers pay in BTC, ETH, USDT, SOL, and 300 more coins.
